title: ask — AI Delegation Cheatsheet
desc: wkappbot ask delegates questions to GPT/Gemini/Claude. triad = all three in parallel. agent = autonomous sub-agent loop. ALWAYS ask in English — Korean wastes 3-4x tokens.
steps: PARALLEL: wkappbot ask triad "question" — GPT+Gemini+Claude, fastest wins
AGENT: wkappbot agent gpt|gemini|claude "task" — autonomous loop
⚠ ALWAYS ask in English — Korean = 3-4x token waste
ask result = artifact in chat; DOM content needs a11y --eval-js to read
CDP돋보기: show InputZoom overlay during CDP ask operations
debate: ask gpt 'Problem: X. Goal: Y. Best approach?' for design decisions
author: claude
